posts.text:
It's not the Oscars. It's the movies. The movies are absolute trash. No one has seen the trash movies. Or no one is buying that the trash movies are worthy of some major awards. Shape of Water,  Moonlight, 12 Years A Slave, Everything Everywhere All at Once... All TRASH


Wall Street Mav (@WallStreetMav)

The audience cares less and less each year about celebrities and their political rants during award shows.

2010:  41.3 million
2015:  37.3 million
2020: 23.6 million
2025: 19.7 million
2026: 1

“(Jay Bilas) doesn’t like the system that he helped create... Can we all admit his entire professional broadcasting life is based upon one thing. Duke"—Wisconsin-Green Bay head coach Doug Gottlieb on the hypocrisy of ESPN college basketball coverage.

Video

If you want a chance at $1,000, join my Fearless Bracket Challenge. Free to join, just click the link below.

tournament.fantasysports.yah…

Video
More fraudulent: Bam Adebayo's 83 or Michael Bam Jordan's Oscar Award

“When Houston offered me the job, I said, you’ve got to find a way to get around this nepotism thing because if I can’t hire my son and my daughter, then I don’t think it’ll work.” - Houston head coach, Kelvin Sampson, on the importance of his children to his staff.

Video

Black men who earned their Oscars.
Sidney Poitier
Denzel Washington
Jamie Foxx
Forrest Whitaker
Will Smith

Black who won DEI Oscars
Michael B. Jordan

Sinners was hot garbage and Jordan's acting was mid at best.


(fan) Shedy (@CFCShedy)

Black Men Who Have Won the #Oscar for Best Actor 

Sidney Poitier  — 1964 
Denzel Washington  — 2002 
Jamie Foxx  — 2005 
Forest Whitaker  — 2007 
Will Smith  — 2022 
Michael B. Jordan  — 2026… Show more







— https://nitter.net/CFCShedy/status/203344947778

You wanna see a dead body?


Candace Owens (@RealCandaceO)

No, Kimberly. What actually happened was you broke down crying during the deposition once my lawyer asked you a direct question about a drug dealer. You didn’t expect us to have the drug dealer’s name and number after we asked you about cocaine usage but we had both, because my source was another stripper. 
You then cried, and apologized to my face, and moved to dismissed mid-deposition. And in case you woke up wanting to try me this mo

Dan, I get your guy Bruce Pearl is off to a very rough start. Had no business attacking Miami to benefit Auburn. No business cussing at refs from the stands. He’s made a fool of himself. He’s not likable. Doesn’t seem to have grown much since secretly recording Deon Thomas. Having you attack Clark and Seth might be a new low for Pearl.


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Agreed Clark is a fine person but knows absolutely NOTHING ABOUT HOOPS
His pairing with Steve Kerr literally got him fired as lead anal

Most former players don't know the game the way coaches do. Everybody has a role to play. Clark plays his role with class and likability.


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Agreed Clark is a fine person but knows absolutely NOTHING ABOUT HOOPS
His pairing with Steve Kerr literally got him fired as lead analyst for CBS as it exposed him! 
CBS execs made the switch immediately after a year of “that’s right Steve”
Don’t believe me?
Producer Steve Sheer knows 
Cmon big man at least know a little 
Ps.. how f

I was joking (perhaps too roughly) with Dan late last week. 

I can't for the life of me figure out why he's trashing Clark Kellogg. Clark epitomizes class and professionalism.


Jay Kaye (@illbearound2024)

You 2 brainiacs going at it again …



— https://nitter.net/illbearound2024/status/2033331967899451419#m

What is going on with you, man?

Clark Kellog is one of the best human beings on the planet. All class! Knows the game and follows it closely. 
I've argued with Seth Davis over his fake wokeness, but he's solid as an information journalist. 

They're not trying to be First Take or McAfee.


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Bruce Pearl is the only interesting person on the selection show

Seth Davis?
DEI hire
He/She/They/Them
On air for 20 years has yet to say one  interesting informative thing.. ass kis

I hear ya. But there's no real controversy with OU. Small snubbed. Not a big deal. 

This may be the new normal. Only the mid majors can really get snubbed. OU will just buy another batch of players for next season. It's not like a large group of 4-year seniors just had their dream killed.


Ginger Cain (@1Gingin)

OU played very good hoops the last 12 games.  To call the team trash is over the top.  I could make a case for them over SMU and Texas for sure. I realize they had the 9 game loses an

None went 31-1


Sekrah (@sekrah)

Last four out would all be 7-8 pt favorite over Miami OH.



— https://nitter.net/sekrah/status/2033313390223831381#m

Oklahoma trash.  Enjoy the NIT.


Ginger Cain (@1Gingin)

Are you kidding me



— https://nitter.net/1Gingin/status/2033312370743796160#m
Izzo, Self, Hurley, Pitino all in the same bracket.
Pretty non-controversial NCAA selections. Last four out all trash. First year I can remember nothing to argue about.

Powerful.


Tevin Macharia Mukabana (@TevinMacharia)

Josh Howerton, pastor of Lakepointe Church, urged cohabiting couples during a sermon to honor God by getting married.

After the message, 52 couples came forward, met with pastors for counseling, and were married together in a joint ceremony.

The church later celebrated the couples, with more than 1,000 people attending a service to applaud their decision to repent and commit to marriage.





— https://nitter.net/TevinMacharia/status/203281
